title: Amtech - Club Hammer, Drop Forged Head with Chamfered Edges, Hickory Handle, Excellent Shock Absorption, Ideal for Stonework and Site Use (35oz / 1kg)
features: TASKS: Suitable for driving and removing nails in wood and carpentry.
DROP-FORGED STEEL: Construction for long-lasting strength.
PRACTICAL SIZE: 35oz weight offers balance and control.
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
COMPACT DESIGN: BACKED BY AMTECH S Backed by Amtech’s 3-year guarantee with UK-based aftercare.
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Box Contains 1x Hammer

specifications_table.Included Components: Amtech A0500 1Kg Club Hammer - Hickory Shaft
